Autopilot Take CareAsk Command All pages Evidence Until-DONE Boundary

One objective · GoalOS takes the proof path

Describe what you want.
GoalOS turns it into proof work.

This is the separate high-level console for visitors who do not want to choose a page first. They type a plain-language objective; GoalOS composes the mission contract, chooses the safest proof route, generates the evidence checklist, and packages a local MissionAutopilotReceipt.

Launch Mission Autopilot → Ask a question instead Read the proof institution

Browser-local demonstration. No account. No form submission. No wallet. No token approval. No network request from the console. No analytics. No cookies. No browser storage. No user data retained. No production authority.

10mission gates
0network calls
1local receipt

Mission Autopilot · v63

Tell GoalOS the outcome. It builds the proof mission.

Proof room before the claim.

03 · Governed Decision State

Awaiting proof gates

Route handoff

GoalOS does not leave the user stranded.

After composing the mission, the console points to the strongest existing page: Evidence Docket Composer, Until-DONE Mission Control, Loop → RSI Control Room, Settlement Lifecycle, Command Center, or the legal/data-zero boundary.

Public-safe boundary

Useful guidance, no hidden authority.

The console produces review material only. It does not claim factual certification, legal advice, financial advice, investment advice, external audit completion, Mainnet execution, wallet authorization, token approval, fund movement, production activation, achieved AGI, or achieved ASI.

© MontrealAI · GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension · browser-local public-safe demos · no wallet · no network request from demos · no user data wanted · Privacy · Terms · Legal · AGIALPHA Boundary
